ValidationRule.description: Prevents lead conversion unless Status is Qualified and at least 3 activities have been logged. Activity_Count__c is maintained by LeadService via trigger. Req: MKT-REQ-SALES-005.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: NOT(ISNEW()) && ISCHANGED(IsConverted) && IsConverted = TRUE && (ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Qualified') = FALSE || Activity_Count__c < 3)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: A lead cannot be converted unless Status is Qualified and at least 3 activities are logged.
